Chronology of every recorded fact about [[sacred artist]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — To be called a sacred artist outside of the valley, one must learn the basics of all four disciplines and harvest a Remnant.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Sacred artists are members of clans who use madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — A sacred artist once mastered a technique to make water from the aura in the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Sacred artists can reach the realm of Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — The measure of a sacred artist is how they respond to risk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Drive is the most important quality for any sacred artist.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — A sacred artist is depicted in a statue wearing robes and a smock.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — A sacred artist used a white madra shaped into a tiger's head to attack a stalagmite.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen led several hundred sacred artists.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The dead humans in the room were lesser sacred artists who accompanied their Monarch to attack the black dragon fortress.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Some street performers are skilled sacred artists.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
